login.title: Personal Dashboard
login.subtitle: Registration is by invitation only. Use Demo mode to explore the app.

login.invite_only: Registration is invite-only. Use Demo mode to explore the app features.
login.description: Personal dashboard for managing finances, health, workouts, and productivity. Integrations with Monobank, Garmin, Withings, brokers (IBKR, Trading 212). AI analytics via Gemini and Groq. Tax reporting UA/ES.
login.mod_finance: Finance — budget tracking, Monobank & NBU integrations
login.mod_my_day: My Day — daily journal (mood, well-being), lifestyle analytics & correlations
login.mod_gym: Gym — workouts (programs, sets, exercises, PRs), Garmin integration, muscle recovery
login.mod_food: Food — food tracking with AI calorie analysis (photo → Gemini Vision)
login.mod_ai: AI — Claude (chat/filter parsing), Gemini 2.5 Flash (food analysis), Groq Llama (transaction parsing)
login.mod_integrations: Integrations: Monobank, Garmin, Withings, Telegram bot, Google OIDC, multi-user with guest invites

settings.title: Settings
settings.no_budgets: No budgets set. Add one below to track spending limits.
settings.no_budget_config: Auto-calculator not configured. Set it up in Settings.
settings.no_recurring: No recurring transactions. Add rent, subscriptions, insurance below.
settings.delete_account_desc: Account "{name}" will be deleted. Choose where to migrate transactions.
settings.remove_future_tx_desc: Deletes all transactions with a date after today.
settings.export_desc: Download all personal data as a multi-sheet Excel file.
settings.no_backups: No backups yet. Daily automatic backups are enabled.
settings.telegram_bot_desc: Personal Telegram bot for quick expense tracking, food logging, and more
settings.telegram_how_to_setup: How to set up your Telegram bot
settings.telegram_setup_instructions:
1. Open Telegram and search for **@BotFather**
2. Send `/newbot` command
3. Follow the instructions to choose a name and username for your bot
4. Copy the **API token** and paste it in the field above
5. Start a chat with your new bot and send `/start`
6. To get your **Chat ID**, message **@userinfobot** in Telegram — it will reply with your ID
7. Paste the Chat ID in the field above
settings.ai_integrations_desc: Configure AI providers for chat, analytics, food analysis, and transaction parsing
settings.ai_gemini_usage: AI Chat, analytics, food photo analysis, AI notes
settings.ai_groq_usage: Fast transaction parsing, voice transcription, shopping list parsing
settings.delete_warning: This will permanently delete ALL your data (transactions, diary, settings). This cannot be undone.
settings.bug_placeholder: What happened? What did you expect?
settings.timezone_desc: Used for date/time display and daily log cutoff
settings.import_transactions_desc: Upload a CSV, Excel, or OFX/QFX file. AI will automatically detect columns and categorize transactions.
settings.import_help_text:
**Supported formats:** CSV, Excel (.xlsx/.xls), OFX/QFX

**How it works:**
1. Upload a file from your bank statement
2. AI (Gemini) automatically detects columns (date, amount, description)
3. AI categorizes transactions based on your existing categories
4. Review and confirm the import

**Duplicates:** The system automatically detects possible duplicates by date, amount, and description.

**Without AI:** If Gemini API key is not configured, you can select columns manually.
settings.import_ai_required: ⚠️ Gemini API key is required for automatic column detection and categorization. Configure it in Integrations → AI. Without it, you can select columns manually.
settings.garmin_setup_instructions:
1. Enter your **Garmin Connect** email and password
2. Click **Save Garmin Credentials**
3. Click **Sync Garmin Data** to download your history
4. If you have MFA enabled, enter the code manually or set up auto-forwarding (see below)
5. Data syncs automatically every 5 minutes (07:00–23:00 UTC)

**Auto MFA setup (recommended):**
1. In Gmail, create a filter: From: alerts@account.garmin.com, Subject: Your Security Passcode → Forward to garmin@your-domain.com
2. Garmin sends MFA code → Gmail auto-forwards to garmin@your-domain.com
3. Cloudflare Email Worker parses the code and sends it to PD API
4. Scheduler picks up the code and completes login automatically
settings.telegram_chat_id_hint: Enter your numeric Telegram Chat ID to receive messages from the bot.
settings.telegram_user_setup_instructions:
1. Open Telegram and find @pd_taras_bot
2. Send /start to the bot
3. Send /myid — the bot will reply with your Chat ID
4. Copy the numeric ID and paste it in the field above
5. Click Save to link your account
settings.monobank_setup_instructions:
1. Open **Monobank** app on your phone
2. Go to **Settings** → **API** → **Get token**
3. Or visit **api.monobank.ua** and log in
4. Copy your **API token** and paste it above
5. Select the account you want to sync
6. Click **Sync** to download transactions
settings.bunq_setup_instructions:
1. Open **bunq** app on your phone
2. Go to **Profile** → **Developers** → **API keys**
3. Create a new **API key** and copy it
4. Paste the API key above and click **Save**
5. Select the account(s) you want to sync
6. Click **Sync now** to download transactions
settings.integrations_per_user: Each user has their own integration settings. Your API keys and tokens are stored separately and are not shared with other users.
settings.tooltip_first_visit: First time here? Click on each section to explore and configure.
settings.tooltip_finance: Track expenses and income. Connect Monobank for automatic sync or upload CSV from other banks.
settings.tooltip_my_day: Daily diary: mood, sleep, activities. Fill in every day for best AI insights.
settings.tooltip_gym: Log workouts, track progress, see recovery status. Connect Garmin for auto-sync.
settings.tooltip_food: Track calories and macros. Send food photos to Telegram bot for AI analysis.
settings.tooltip_dashboard: Analytics overview of all your data. Works best after 1+ month of tracking.
settings.tooltip_ai_chat: Ask AI about your data — finances, health, mood patterns.
settings.ai_insights_empty_section: No insights for this section yet. Generate them from the corresponding page.
settings.bunq_oauth_note: OAuth connection will be implemented later. Use API token as alternative.
settings.cobee_setup_instructions:
1. Use your **Cobee** email and password to sign in
2. Enter your credentials in the fields above
3. Click **Save** to store them
4. Cobee card data will sync automatically
settings.withings_oauth_note: OAuth connection is required to sync weight and body composition data from Withings.
settings.withings_setup_instructions:
1. Click **Connect Withings** above
2. Log in to your **Withings** account
3. Allow access to weight and body composition data
4. Once connected, data will sync automatically
5. Supported: weight, body fat %, muscle mass, BMI
settings.import_upload_area: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
settings.tax_ua_dps_desc: Connection to cabinet.tax.gov.ua for importing declarations and payment status.
